creator: rpp@ci.com.au
text:
This is a me-too. We first encountered this in 12.1 revision r363264 so it predates 12.2 release. Its a showstopper for us, preventing us upgrading our 3 file servers from 11.3 (r349924). 
We have a couple of VMs set up that can quickly replicate the problem, so we can assist with testing if needed.
